name: Case Study: Post-Divorce Adjustment
history: Recent divorce. Financial struggles and adjustment to single life. Co-parenting. Multiple friendships deteriorated after the divorce. Complicated relationship with parents.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must maintain friendships even if they are draining.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am responsible for fixing others' problems.
coping_strategies: Maintaining relationships with 'fixer-up' friends to avoid feeling alone.
situation: Managing financial hardship following the divorce, including handling financial paperwork.
auto_thought: I can't handle this financial situation alone.
behavior: Avoids addressing financial issues directly, maintains draining friendships to avoid loneliness.
